entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop grown in India during the post-rainy season.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the climate change impact on sorghum yields is being studied.

entities.name: MULTI-CLIMATE MODEL MEAN (MMM)
entities.description: A model mean used for impact assessment studies to simulate rainfall and surface air temperatures.

entities.name: COUPLED MODEL INTERCOMPARISON PROJECT PHASE 5 (CMIP5)
entities.description: A project used to simulate features of Indian summer monsoons and post-rainy seasons.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The environmental shift being studied for its potential impacts on crop yields.

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The specific agricultural season being analyzed for sorghum yields.

entities.name: INDIAN SUMMER MONSOONS
entities.description: The seasonal weather pattern simulated by CMIP5.

entities.name: SORGHUM YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the sorghum crop being estimated under future climate scenarios.

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: A climatic variable simulated by the MMM simulations.

entities.name: SURFACE AIR TEMPERATURES
entities.description: A climatic variable simulated by the MMM simulations.

entities.name: CROP ENVIRONMENT RESOURCE SYNTHESIS (CERES)-SORGHUM MODEL
entities.description: A model used to estimate the potential impacts of future climate change on sorghum yield values.

entities.name: PRECIPITATION
entities.description: A climatic variable observed to have bias in MMM simulations.
